title: cyclosorus exsculptus
intro: Cyclosorus exsculptus, also known as the exsculptus fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the division Pteridophyta and is commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The medicinal properties of Cyclosorus exsculptus include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, and it can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction for its medicinal purposes.
